title: Three freeze and sniff pancakes
negativePrompt: extra people, duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same person, mirrored figure, background extras, crowd, identical sibling
prompt: Wide shot, static, @Livingroom. @Sara stands center-frame next to @Eva. @Ginger sits at @Sara's feet. @Sara, @Eva, and @Ginger freeze, noses up. @Sara whispers: "Pancakes."
